artifact.description: HALOS domain example for Open Source Project Governance — narrative document (open-source-project.md) and provenance record (open-source-project.halos.json)

ai_assistance.description: Generated narrative document and provenance record following GENERATE-EXAMPLE.md workflow, using reference examples and HALOS v0.3 spec as templates

decisions.description: Selected 'Open Source Project Governance' as the domain — a custom domain not in the predefined catalog
decisions.context: Eight domains already implemented in the examples catalog. User chose to propose a new domain rather than select from available options.
decisions.rationale: Open source project governance is a distinct and underrepresented domain that demonstrates unique HALOS value: community transparency about AI involvement in security-critical infrastructure releases.

notes: Self-provenance record for example generation. Created by GENERATE-EXAMPLE.md workflow.
